svg.text: CCBJI Azure Data Engineering Platform — High Level Architecture
Medallion Architecture (Bronze → Silver → Gold) · Azure Databricks · ADF · ADLS Gen2 · Unity Catalog
Reads → Executes proc → Copies incremental rows → Builds dynamic path
Loads watermark → Executes proc → Copies Incremental rows → Builds dynamic path
Reads config → Calls REST endpoint with pagination → Saves JSON → Builds path
Reads config → Calls REST endpoint with pagination → Saves JSON → Builds path
Checks metadata → Validates file exists → Copies to landing → Builds dated path
Checks metadata → Validates file exists → Copies to landing → Builds dated path
YAML configs for Ingestion / Standardization / Transformation · Watermark tracking · Pipeline run log · DQ check log · Alert log
• Data Quality (5 check types): row_count · not_null · not_negative
• Standardization: trim · upper · cast · add_column transforms
• SCD Type 2 Dimensions (SHA-256 attribute hash, MERGE logic)
• Fact (Star Schema) — transaction hash idempotent upsert
• Gold DQ (7 types): row_count_min · not_null · not_negative
• Column Masking (Unity Catalog) + Temporal FK join
• ADF orchestrates Databricks notebook runs via Linked Service
ADF orchestrates Databricks notebook runs via Linked Service → Databricks Jobs
Unity Catalog — Unified data governance & cataloging
RBAC / Access Control — AAD groups · Service principals · MSI
Column Level Security — SHA-256 masking · PII Protection · CMK
Data Lineage — Column-level: ADLS → Bronze → Silver → Gold
GitHub Actions CI/CD — 87 pytest tests · YAML validator · Manual prod gate
